title: APIFuse AuthTurn envelope v1
description: Protocol message exchanged during auth.flow ceremonies. kind is an open string; known kinds are tooling metadata, not a wire constraint.

kind.description: Open turn kind. Known kinds are listed in the TURN_KINDS registry; unknown kinds remain valid on the wire.

expiresAt.description: Turn expiry timestamp as an ISO 8601 / RFC 3339 string.

data.description: Kind-specific payload. Terminal kinds carry the payloads described in $defs.

expectedInput.description: JSON Schema describing the input expected next.

hint.description: Deprecated but load-bearing human-readable hint materialized from provider locale catalogs.

hintKey.description: Provider locale catalog key for the turn hint.

timing.description: Client pacing guidance for poll-style turns.

completeTurnData.title: Terminal payload for kind "complete"
completeTurnData.description: data payload of a complete turn. The gateway extracts data.credential for persistence; complete turns are never echoed to browsers.

abortTurnData.title: Terminal payload for kind "abort"
abortTurnData.description: data payload of an abort turn. code, when present, is the machine-readable abort reason.
